alpha_hunter.name: Alpha Hunter
alpha_hunter.description: Achieve a Sharpe ratio greater than 2.

underminer.name: Underminer
underminer.description: Achieve a Sharpe ratio less than -2.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.description: Achieve a win rate greater than 80%.

hard_nut.name: Hard Nut
hard_nut.description: Have a maximum drawdown less than 5%.

marathon_runner.name: Marathon Runner
marathon_runner.description: Run a backtest longer than one year.

strategy_5_blocks.name: Architect
strategy_5_blocks.description: Create a strategy with 5 or more blocks.

10_strategies_discovery.name: Gold Digger
10_strategies_discovery.description: Find 10 strategies in the Discovery Lab.

phoenix.name: Phoenix
phoenix.description: A strategy that recovered from a 10% drawdown and showed a new equity high.

inventor.name: Inventor
inventor.description: Create a strategy using 5+ different types of "foundations".
